modules.title: The Carbon Atom's Journey
modules.description: Follow a single carbon atom through Earth's interconnected cycle — from air to life to rock and back again.

modules.title: The Keeling Curve
modules.description: Explore the iconic CO₂ measurement record from Mauna Loa — the most important dataset in climate science.

modules.title: The Carbon Budget Game
modules.description: Earth has a limited carbon budget to stay below 1.5°C. Spend wisely — or watch it run out.

modules.title: Restoration Projects Explorer
modules.description: Discover nature-based carbon removal projects worldwide — from mangrove restoration to reforestation.

modules.title: The Carbon Market Explorer
modules.description: How is carbon priced, traded, and sold? Explore the voluntary and compliance markets.

modules.title: Drawdown Solutions Explorer
modules.description: The 100 most substantive solutions to reverse global warming — ranked, compared, and scored.

modules.title: Your Carbon Footprint
modules.description: Calculate your personal carbon footprint and discover exactly where to cut emissions.

modules.title: Climate Justice & Equity
modules.description: Who bears the burden of a warming planet? Explore the intersection of climate change and inequality.
